\tzpentry{ID5540}{Scale Propagator Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5540 introduces Scale Propagator Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} G_{\rm eff} \sim \frac{p_0}{m_0} \frac{1}{n_{\rm scale}\,\tau_{\rm transfer}} \ell^2, \end{equation}
